productPageReviews.reviewDescription: I’ve been a coloring-book addict for years, but most color-by-number books leave me either bored or frustrated—either the designs are too obvious or I’m constantly second-guessing if I have the right shades. This book completely changed the game for me. It’s not just another coloring book; it’s a thoughtfully engineered, stress-free creative escape.The 50 hidden pixel-art masterpieces are pure genius. Each page feels like unwrapping a surprise gift as the image slowly reveals itself square by square.If you love coloring, pixel art, or just need a screen-free way to unwind without any hassle, this book is an absolute must-have.
productPageReviews.reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United States on March 10, 2026

productPageReviews.reviewDescription: I'm enjoying this coloring book so far. From what I gather so far the designs are quite beautiful.
productPageReviews.reviewedIn: Reviewed in the United States on April 1, 2026

productPageReviews.reviewDescription: Color by Number: Guided Mysteries is a refreshing take on the classic color-by-number genre, trading traditional line art for a sophisticated mosaic and pixel-art aesthetic. The book’s primary appeal lies in its "mystery" element; many of the designs are composed of intricate geometric patterns or small circular cells that don't immediately reveal the subject matter. This creates a rewarding sense of discovery as the image—ranging from majestic Ferris wheels to delicate floral arrangements—slowly comes into focus with every added color. The variety of themes, including landscapes, wildlife, and portraits, ensures that the content remains engaging and never feels repetitive.The book is particularly well-suited for those seeking a meditative, low-stress hobby. Because the color palettes are "guided," it removes the often-intimidating pressure of color theory, allowing the artist to simply focus on the tactile act of filling in the cells. The grid-based structure provides a satisfying sense of order, making it an excellent choice for both meticulous perfectionists and casual hobbyists looking to unwind. While the complexity of the cells requires a bit of focus and perhaps a fine-tipped set of markers or pens, the end results are strikingly vibrant and "digital" in appearance, offering a unique finished product that stands out from standard coloring books.

productPageReviews.reviewTitle: Sometimes, you just need to chill ...
productPageReviews.reviewDescription: I love doing crafty things -- intricate thread crochet, hand-crafted greeting cards, coloring detailed designs, knitting, counted cross stitch, diamond painting, etc.  But SOMETIMES, I just need something a little "mindless," where I don't have to think too hard or worry too much about counting or dexterity.These sticker-by-number books seem to work well for those times when I just need to wind down.This particular book has some nice designs, some with a little detail, some with repetitive shapes/colors, but all easy to do in a short amount of time (usually about an hour).  Many are "folk-art-ish" with geometric shapes.  The colors range from bright primaries to muted softer "country" tones.  A nice enjoyable "doesn't require a lot of thought" pastime.I'm giving 4 stars because occasionally the pieces don't quite fit into the intended space -- I usually use bent-tip opposing tweezers to place the stickers so it's not a matter of having the angle slightly off -- the piece is just cut slightly smaller (or something).  However, those are few and far between.  Overall, it's an enjoyable activity when I need to chill.

productPageReviews.reviewTitle: Relaxing, Accessible, and So Much Fun!
productPageReviews.reviewDescription: Simple Color by Number is exactly what it promises—an easy-to-enjoy coloring book with bold, large-print designs that anyone can tackle, from beginners to seasoned colorists. The numbered guide takes all the guesswork out of choosing colors, so you can jump right into relaxing without staring at a blank page wondering where to start.I love how the illustrations strike the perfect balance: simple enough to finish in one sitting, yet detailed enough to feel rewarding once the colors fill in. The pages are single-sided and a nice thickness, so markers don’t bleed through, and the numbers are large and clear—great for kids, teens, seniors, or anyone who’d rather not squint at tiny details.Whether I have ten minutes between tasks or want to unwind before bed, this book lets me switch off my brain and enjoy a burst of creativity. If you’re looking for a no-stress, feel-good coloring experience, this book is a five-star gem!

productPageReviews.reviewDescription: I am enjoying coloring these simple, big, and bold designs more than the more intricate pictures because it's very easy to complete and relaxing to do. The numbers are easy to read, and the number key is on the back of the book for all the pictures inside.

products.bookDescription:
Keep your brain engaged while creating fun, beautiful art, with Sticker by Number Inspiration!  As in color or paint-by-number, each design is divided into dozens of spaces. Each space has number that corresponds to a sticker. Find the sticker, peel it, and place it in the right space. Watch as a full colored image emerges from the original unfinished illustration. Features 10 nature-themed images to sticker, including sunflowers, mountains, butterflies, and birds!Spiral binding and perforated pages make it easy to use!Made for adults but kids can enjoy as well!

aiReviewsSummary.text: Customers find this sticker book entertaining and relaxing, with pretty pictures that create stained glass-like effects when completed. The book is easy to use and great for adults, with one customer noting it's perfect for unwinding after a busy day. They appreciate its brain development benefits, with one mentioning it helps with fine motor skills development, and another noting it's suitable for dementia patients. The durability of the stickers receives mixed feedback, with some customers saying they stick well while others find them hard to peel.

productPageReviews.reviewTitle: GREAT FOR SENIORS, bought it for my 88 year old mom
productPageReviews.reviewDescription: Not much to say but FANTASTIC STICKER BOOK!!  My mom is 88 and I bought these for her, OMG, she can't put them down, we've bought quite a few, maybe 8 or 9, and the very first day she got them, she couldn't put it down, and was up till almost 3am doing stickers!!  Even with her bad eye sight, and macular degeneration, she had no problem getting the stickers in the right spots, it's easier if you use a pair of tweezers, that was her idea.  But if you have a senior citizen in the house and they like to keep busy....go for it, at least one book just to try it out.  She's out of books now, so I have to place another order, this time she said "make sure you buy me more than 4 at a time, that's good for maybe a week" lol, gotta love your mom's !!!!!
